final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] obf_binary_input,
    output reg [3:0] twos_complement_output
);always @(*) begin
        if (obf_binary_input[3] == 1) begin
            twos_complement_output = ~obf_binary_input + 1;
        end else begin
            twos_complement_output = obf_binary_input;
        end
    end

endmodule
